desc: Spec: merge(g1, g2, connections) — combine DAGs at reconcile() join points
pattern:
1. Study reconcile() to understand join points
2. Design merge semantics (inputs, outputs, validation)
3. Write docs/decisions/merge-design.md with signature, semantics, use cases, invariants
signature: merge<T1, T2>(g1: Graph<T1>, g2: Graph<T2>, connections: [{g1Node, g2Node, artifact}], ...)
